Our Story

20+ years of
curated surfaces
for Indore.

Founded in 2002, Padmawati Enterprises has been Indore's trusted partner for premium decorative interior surface materials. From architects and interior designers to carpenters and homeowners — we are the source.

The Decor Castle is our next chapter: a 7-floor experience center under construction, designed to let you see, touch, and truly understand every material before you commit.

22+
Years in Business
9
Product Categories
7
Brand Partners
7
Floors · Coming Soon

Our Range

Nine categories.
Infinite possibilities.

Every material — from Charcoal Louvres to Industrial Adhesive — sourced directly from India's finest manufacturers and available only through authorised distributors like us.

01
Charcoal Louvres
Architectural charcoal panels for statement ceilings, feature walls, and refined spatial design.
Architectural
02
Mica
Decorative laminates with rich texture and depth — the everyday choice of fine furniture-makers.
Decorative Laminate
03
Liner
Flexible surface films for seamless coverage on curved and flat surfaces alike.
Surface Film
04
Veneer
Real wood veneers that bring the warmth and grain of nature to any interior surface.
Natural Wood
05
Plywood
Structural plywood for furniture, cabinetry, and load-bearing interior applications.
Structural Core
06
Acrylic
Ultra-glossy acrylic sheets delivering a mirror-like finish for premium kitchen and wardrobe fronts.
High Gloss
07
PVC
Durable moisture-resistant panels ideal for wet areas, ceilings, and high-traffic surfaces.
Functional Surface
08
Hardware
Premium furniture hardware exclusively from Trend — hinges, channels, handles, and more.
Trend Exclusive
09
Adhesive
Industrial-grade bonding solutions from Hindbond 7 Star — trusted by carpenters across M.P.
Hindbond Exclusive

Experience Center

Seven floors.
One destination.

Our upcoming Experience Center in Indore is designed for those who want to see, touch, and truly understand a material before they commit. Appointment-only. Every detail considered.

  • ↑Top FloorConsultation Lounge
  • 4Experience — Part 2Veneer · Plywood · Acrylic · PVC · Hardware
  • 3Experience — Part 1Louvres · Mica · Liner · Brand Story
  • 1–2OperationsStorage & Dispatch
  • GWarehouseReceiving & Ground Stock
  • BBasementDeep Storage · Lift Access
Appointment Only
Coming Soon · Indore
